'''Fluffy''' was—allegedly—[[Vilmarh Grahrk]]'s [[Gender/Legends|female]] pet [[stalking onsonker]], to which he fed [[Palpatine/Legends|Bobo]] after he failed to produce the "Secret Treasure of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]." Grahrk supposedly planted Fluffy's seeds inside Bobo so that the onsonker could hunt him down and devour him.<ref name="SW41" />
